NLP.title: PSK at SemEval-2026 Task 9: Multilingual Polarization Detection Using Ensemble Gemma Models with Synthetic Data Augmentation
NLP.title_zh: PSK在SemEval-2026任务9中的应用：基于集成Gemma模型与合成数据增强的多语言极化检测
NLP.summary: We present our system for SemEval-2026 Task 9: Multilingual Polarization Detection, a binary classification task spanning 22 languages. Our approach fine-tunes separate Gemma~3 models (12B and 27B parameters) per language using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), augmented with synthetic data generated by a
NLP.summary_zh: 本文介绍了SemEval-2026任务9（多语言极化检测）的系统，该任务为覆盖22种语言的二分类任务。作者采用低秩适配（LoRA）对每个语言分别微调Gemma 3模型（12B和27B参数），并通过合成数据增强提升性能。创新点在于利用集成多个微调模型的方法，结合合成数据缓解低资源语言的数据稀缺问题，显著提高了多语言极化检测的准确性。主要贡献是提出了一种可扩展的多语言框架，在22种语言上实现了鲁棒的极化检测。

NLP.title: Anticipating Innovation Using Large Language Models
NLP.title_zh: 利用大语言模型预测创新
NLP.summary: Forecasting innovation, intended as the emergence of new technological combinations, is a fundamental challenge for science and policy. We show that forthcoming combinations leave an early trace in the collective language of patents, with predictive signals detectable even decades in advance. We sho
NLP.summary_zh: 本文提出利用大语言模型预测技术创新，即新技术组合的出现。作者发现，未来技术组合在专利集体语言中会留下早期痕迹，可提前数十年检测到预测信号。通过分析专利文本中的语言模式，LLM能够识别出即将出现的创新组合。创新点在于将LLM应用于技术预测领域，利用其语义理解能力从海量专利文本中捕捉隐含的创新信号。主要贡献是提供了一种基于语言模型的前瞻性创新预测方法，对科学政策和研发决策具有重要价值。

NLP.title: Assessing Cognitive Effort in L2 Idiomatic Processing: An Eye-Tracking Dataset
NLP.title_zh: 评估二语习语处理中的认知努力：一个眼动追踪数据集
NLP.summary: This paper presents the development and validation of an eye-tracking dataset designed to investigate how second-language (L2) learners process idiomatic expressions. While native speakers often rely on direct retrieval of figurative meanings, L2 speakers frequently adopt a literal-first approach, which increases cognitive load. The dataset includes gaze data from 40 L2 learners reading sentences with idiomatic and literal expressions. We provide baseline results using machine learning models to predict cognitive effort from linguistic features. This dataset enables research into L2 processing and adaptive language learning systems.
NLP.summary_zh: 本文介绍了一个眼动追踪数据集的构建与验证，用于研究第二语言（L2）学习者如何处理习语表达。与母语者直接检索比喻意义不同，L2学习者常采用字面优先策略，导致认知负荷增加。数据集包含40名L2学习者阅读习语和字面表达句子的注视数据。创新点：提供了利用机器学习模型从语言特征预测认知努力的基线结果。该数据集为L2处理研究和自适应语言学习系统奠定了基础。

NLP.title: Storage Is Not Memory: A Retrieval-Centered Architecture for Agent Recall
NLP.title_zh: 存储不是记忆：面向检索的智能体回忆架构
NLP.summary: Extraction at ingestion is the wrong primitive for agent memory: content discarded before the query is known cannot be recovered at retrieval time. We propose True Memory, a six-layer architecture that shifts the center of the system from a storage schema to a multi-stage retrieval pipeline operatin
NLP.summary_zh: 在摄入时进行提取是智能体记忆的错误基本操作：在查询已知之前丢弃的内容无法在检索时恢复。本文提出True Memory，一种六层架构，将系统中心从存储模式转移到多阶段检索管道。创新点在于重新定义了智能体记忆为检索过程而非存储过程，引入了分层检索机制，包括语义索引、上下文重排序和动态摘要生成。主要贡献是解决了传统记忆系统在信息丢失和检索效率上的瓶颈，显著提升了智能体在长对话和复杂任务中的回忆能力。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Piper: Efficient Large-Scale MoE Training via Resource Modeling and Pipelined Hybrid Parallelism
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: Piper：通过资源建模和流水线混合并行实现高效大规模MoE训练
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Frontier models increasingly adopt Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures to achieve large-model performance at reduced cost. However, training MoE models on HPC platforms is hindered by large memory footprints, frequent large-scale communication across heterogeneous networks, and severe workload im
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 前沿模型越来越多地采用混合专家（MoE）架构以低成本实现大模型性能，但在HPC平台上训练MoE模型面临内存占用大、跨异构网络频繁大规模通信以及严重负载不均等挑战。本文提出Piper系统，通过资源建模和流水线混合并行策略优化MoE训练效率。创新点在于将资源建模与流水线并行相结合，动态分配计算和通信资源，减少空闲时间。主要贡献是显著提升了MoE模型在大规模集群上的训练吞吐量，降低了通信开销，为高效训练大型MoE模型提供了实用方案。

大语言模型/LLM.title: EP-GRPO: Entropy-Progress Aligned Group Relative Policy Optimization with Implicit Process Guidance
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: EP-GRPO：熵-进度对齐的组相对策略优化与隐式过程引导
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), particularly Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), has advanced LLM reasoning. However, GRPO suffers from three credit assignment failures: uniform token-level granularity that ignores heterogeneous informational value, uniform polarity that treats correct and incorrect tokens equally, and uniform temporal weighting that overlooks varying reasoning difficulty across steps. To address these, we propose EP-GRPO, which introduces Entropy-Progress Alignment (EPA) to dynamically adjust token-level weights based on information entropy and reasoning progress, and Implicit Process Guidance (IPG) to provide step-level rewards without explicit process supervision. Experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks show EP-GRPO significantly improves reasoning accuracy and efficiency over GRPO.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文提出EP-GRPO，针对GRPO在LLM推理中的三个信用分配失败问题（忽略令牌异质信息价值、对待正确与错误令牌无差别、忽略步骤推理难度差异）进行改进。创新点包括：熵-进度对齐（EPA）根据信息熵和推理进度动态调整令牌级权重；隐式过程引导（IPG）无需显式过程监督即可提供步骤级奖励。在数学推理基准上，EP-GRPO显著提升了推理准确率和效率。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Executable World Models for ARC-AGI-3 in the Era of Coding Agents
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 编码智能体时代的ARC-AGI-3可执行世界模型
大语言模型/LLM.summary: We evaluate an initial coding-agent system for ARC-AGI-3 in which the agent maintains an executable Python world model, verifies it against previous observations, refactors it toward simpler abstractions as a practical proxy for an MDL-like simplicity bias, and plans through the model before acting.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文评估了一个针对ARC-AGI-3的初始编码智能体系统，其中智能体维护一个可执行的Python世界模型，根据先前观察验证模型，将其重构为更简单的抽象作为MDL类简单性偏好的实用代理，并在行动前通过模型进行规划。创新点在于将世界模型视为可执行代码，结合验证、重构和规划，实现了在抽象推理任务中的高效推理。主要贡献是展示了编码智能体在解决ARC-AGI-3挑战中的潜力，为通用人工智能研究提供了新思路。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Evolving Idea Graphs with Learnable Edits-and-Commits for Multi-Agent Scientific Ideation
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 基于可学习编辑与提交的多智能体科学创意演化图
大语言模型/LLM.summary: LLM-empowered multi-agent systems offer new potential to accelerate scientific discovery by generating novel research ideas. However, existing methods typically coordinate agents through temporary texts, such as drafts or chat logs; it is difficult to pinpoint the weaknesses in the generated ideas and systematically refine them. We propose a framework that evolves a shared idea graph across multiple rounds of agent interactions. Each agent contributes by proposing edits (modifications to nodes/edges) and commits (finalizing changes), guided by a learnable scoring module that evaluates the quality of each edit. This enables transparent tracking of idea evolution and identification of which modifications improve the idea. Experiments on scientific ideation benchmarks show that our method generates higher-quality ideas compared to existing multi-agent baselines, with improved novelty and feasibility. The idea graph also provides interpretable insights into the creative process.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 针对大语言模型驱动的多智能体系统在科学创意生成中的局限性，本文提出一种演化式创意图框架。现有方法通过临时文本协调智能体，难以定位创意弱点并进行系统性改进。该框架在多轮智能体交互中维护共享的创意图，每个智能体通过提出编辑（修改节点/边）和提交（确定更改）来贡献，并由可学习的评分模块评估每次编辑的质量。这使得创意演化过程透明可追溯，并能识别出哪些修改提升了创意质量。在科学创意基准上的实验表明，该方法相比现有基线生成了更高质量、更具新颖性和可行性的创意，且创意图提供了对创造过程的可解释洞察。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Continual Knowledge Updating in LLM Systems: Learning Through Multi-Timescale Memory Dynamics
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: LLM系统中的持续知识更新：通过多时间尺度记忆动力学学习
大语言模型/LLM.summary: LLMs are trained once, then deployed into a world that never stops changing. External memory compensates for this, but most systems manage it explicitly rather than letting it adapt on its own. Biological memory works differently: coupled multi-timescale dynamics make new associations immediately usable while old knowledge persists. We propose a novel external memory architecture for LLMs that mimics these biological principles, enabling continual knowledge updating without retraining. Our approach uses multiple memory modules with different update rates, allowing the model to integrate new information rapidly while retaining long-term knowledge. Experiments on question answering and dialogue tasks show significant improvements in knowledge freshness and accuracy compared to static models and traditional memory-augmented approaches.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文针对LLM部署后知识过时的问题，提出了一种受生物记忆启发的多时间尺度外部记忆架构。核心创新在于模仿生物记忆的耦合多时间尺度动力学，使新信息能够快速整合到模型中，同时保留长期知识，无需重新训练。该方法通过多个具有不同更新速率的记忆模块实现持续知识更新。在问答和对话任务上的实验表明，与静态模型和传统记忆增强方法相比，该方法在知识新鲜度和准确性上均有显著提升。主要贡献：提出了一种无需重训即可持续更新LLM知识的记忆架构，并验证了其有效性。

大语言模型/LLM.title: SoK: Robustness in Large Language Models against Jailbreak Attacks
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 系统化知识：大语言模型对抗越狱攻击的鲁棒性
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success but remain highly susceptible to jailbreak attacks, in which adversarial prompts coerce models into generating harmful, unethical, or policy-violating outputs. Such attacks pose real-world risks, eroding safety, trust, and regulatory compliance. This paper presents a Systematization of Knowledge (SoK) on LLM robustness against jailbreak attacks, categorizing attack and defense strategies, evaluating their effectiveness, and identifying open challenges.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）取得了显著成功，但仍极易受到越狱攻击，即通过对抗性提示迫使模型生成有害、不道德或违反政策的输出。此类攻击带来现实风险，削弱安全性、信任和合规性。本文对LLM对抗越狱攻击的鲁棒性进行了系统化知识梳理，分类攻击和防御策略，评估其有效性，并指出开放挑战。

大语言模型/LLM.title: The Impossibility Triangle of Long-Context Modeling
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 长上下文建模的不可能三角
大语言模型/LLM.summary: We identify and prove a fundamental trade-off governing long-sequence models: no model can simultaneously achieve (i) per-step computation independent of sequence length (Efficiency), (ii) state size independent of sequence length (Compactness), and (iii) the ability to recall a number of historical tokens that grows super-constantly with context length (Retrievability). This impossibility theorem provides theoretical guidance for designing long-context models.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 我们识别并证明了一个支配长序列模型的基本权衡：没有模型能同时实现（i）每步计算与序列长度无关（高效性）、（ii）状态大小与序列长度无关（紧凑性）以及（iii）能够回忆的历史token数量随上下文长度超常数增长（可检索性）。这一不可能定理为设计长上下文模型提供了理论指导。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Delta-Based Neural Architecture Search: LLM Fine-Tuning via Code Diffs
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 基于差异的神经架构搜索：通过代码差异微调大语言模型
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Large language models (LLMs) show strong potential for neural architecture generation, yet existing approaches produce complete model implementations from scratch -- computationally expensive and yielding verbose code. We propose Delta-Code Generation, where fine-tuned LLMs generate compact unified diffs (additions, modifications, deletions) against a reference architecture. This reduces token usage by 70% while improving architecture generation success rate by 20%.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）在神经架构生成方面展现出强大潜力，但现有方法从头生成完整的模型实现——计算成本高且代码冗长。我们提出Delta-Code生成方法，即微调后的LLM生成相对于参考架构的紧凑统一差异（添加、修改、删除）。该方法将token使用量减少70%，同时将架构生成成功率提高20%。

大语言模型/LLM.title: A Foundation Model for Zero-Shot Logical Rule Induction
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 用于零样本逻辑规则归纳的基础模型
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) learns interpretable logical rules from data. Existing methods are transductive: their learned parameters are bound to specific predicates and require retraining for each new task. We introduce Neural Rule Inducer (NRI), a pretrained model for zero-shot rule induction.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 归纳逻辑编程（ILP）从数据中学习可解释的逻辑规则。现有方法是传导性的：其学习参数绑定到特定谓词，每遇到新任务都需要重新训练。本文提出神经规则归纳器（NRI），一个用于零样本规则归纳的预训练模型。创新点在于将逻辑规则归纳转化为序列生成任务，通过在大规模规则语料上预训练，使模型能够直接为新谓词归纳规则，无需任务特定微调。主要贡献包括：首次实现ILP的零样本迁移；提出基于Transformer的规则生成架构；在多个基准上超越传统方法，展示了强大的泛化能力。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Preference-Based Self-Distillation: Beyond KL Matching via Reward Regularization
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 基于偏好的自蒸馏：通过奖励正则化超越KL匹配
大语言模型/LLM.summary: On-policy distillation is an efficient alternative to reinforcement learning, offering dense token-level training signals. However, its reliance on a stronger external teacher has driven recent work on on-policy self-distillation, where the same model serves as both teacher and student under different configurations. This paper proposes a preference-based self-distillation method that uses reward regularization to go beyond simple KL divergence matching, improving performance without external teachers.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 在线蒸馏是强化学习的高效替代方案，提供密集的token级训练信号。然而，它依赖更强的外部教师，这促使了在线自蒸馏的研究（同一模型在不同配置下同时作为教师和学生）。本文提出基于偏好的自蒸馏方法，通过奖励正则化超越了简单的KL散度匹配，无需外部教师即可提升性能。创新点在于将偏好学习与自蒸馏结合，利用奖励信号指导蒸馏过程，提高了蒸馏效率和模型能力。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Uno-Orchestra: Parsimonious Agent Routing via Selective Delegation
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: Uno-Orchestra：通过选择性委派实现简约智能体路由
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Large language model (LLM) multi-agent systems typically rely on rigid orchestration, committing either to flat per-query routing or to hand-engineered task decomposition, so decomposition depth, worker choice, and inference budget are not jointly optimized under one objective. We introduce Uno-Orchestra, a framework that formulates multi-agent orchestration as a selective delegation problem. It learns to dynamically decide whether to delegate a task to a specialized worker or handle it directly, and how deep to decompose, all while optimizing a budget-constrained objective. Experiments on multi-step reasoning and code generation tasks show that Uno-Orchestra achieves better performance with lower cost compared to fixed orchestration strategies.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 针对大语言模型多智能体系统中刚性编排导致分解深度、工人选择和推理预算无法联合优化的问题，本文提出Uno-Orchestra框架。它将多智能体编排建模为选择性委派问题，学习动态决定是否将任务委派给专业工人或直接处理，以及分解深度，同时优化预算约束目标。在多步推理和代码生成任务上，该方法相比固定编排策略以更低成本实现了更优性能。

机器人.title: Position: Embodied AI Requires a Privacy-Utility Trade-off
机器人.title_zh: 立场：具身人工智能需要隐私-效用权衡
机器人.summary: Embodied AI (EAI) systems are rapidly transitioning from simulations into real-world domestic and other sensitive environments. However, recent EAI solutions have largely demonstrated advancements within isolated stages such as instruction, perception, planning and interaction, without considering t
机器人.summary_zh: 具身人工智能（EAI）系统正从仿真快速转向真实家庭等敏感环境，但现有研究多局限于指令、感知、规划、交互等孤立阶段的进展，忽视了隐私问题。本文提出EAI系统必须在隐私和效用之间进行权衡。创新点在于首次系统性地论证了EAI中隐私的重要性，并提出了一个隐私-效用权衡框架。主要贡献是推动了EAI社区对隐私问题的重视，为设计隐私保护型具身智能系统提供了理论基础和指导原则。

机器人.title: Driver-WM: A Driver-Centric Traffic-Conditioned Latent World Model for In-Cabin Dynamics Rollout
机器人.title_zh: Driver-WM：面向驾驶员的交通条件潜世界模型用于车内动态展开
机器人.summary: Safe L2/L3 driving automation requires anticipating human-in-the-loop reactions during shared-control transitions. While most driving world models forecast the external environment, in-cabin intelligence remains strictly recognition-oriented and lacks multi-step rollout capabilities for driver dynamics. We propose Driver-WM, a driver-centric latent world model that predicts future driver states (e.g., gaze, hand position) conditioned on traffic scenes and actions. It uses a conditional variational autoencoder with temporal attention to model driver behavior dynamics. Experiments on Drive&Act and DMD datasets show Driver-WM outperforms baselines in long-horizon prediction, enabling proactive in-cabin safety systems.
机器人.summary_zh: 安全L2/L3自动驾驶需要预测共享控制切换中的人类反应。现有驾驶世界模型主要预测外部环境，而车内智能局限于识别，缺乏对驾驶员动态的多步展开能力。本文提出Driver-WM，一个以驾驶员为中心的潜世界模型，以交通场景和动作为条件预测未来驾驶员状态（如注视、手部位置）。创新点：采用条件变分自编码器与时序注意力建模驾驶员行为动态。在Drive&Act和DMD数据集上，Driver-WM在长时域预测中优于基线，支持主动式车内安全系统。

机器人.title: Modular Reinforcement Learning For Cooperative Swarms
机器人.title_zh: 面向协同蜂群的模块化强化学习
机器人.summary: A cooperative robot swarm is a collective of computationally-limited robots that share a common goal. Each robot can only interact with a small subset of its peers, without knowing how this affects the collective utility. Recent advances in distributed multi-agent reinforcement learning have demonst
机器人.summary_zh: 协同机器人蜂群是由计算能力有限的机器人组成的集体，它们共享一个共同目标。每个机器人只能与一小部分同伴交互，而不清楚这如何影响集体效用。分布式多智能体强化学习的最新进展已显示出潜力，但面临可扩展性和泛化挑战。本文提出模块化强化学习框架，将蜂群任务分解为可复用的子策略模块。创新点在于设计了模块化架构，允许机器人根据局部信息动态组合子策略，实现高效协同。主要贡献是提升了蜂群在复杂任务中的学习效率和适应性。

机器人.title: LineRides: Line-Guided Reinforcement Learning for Bicycle Robot Stunts
机器人.title_zh: LineRides：基于线条引导的自行车机器人特技强化学习
机器人.summary: Designing reward functions for agile robotic maneuvers in reinforcement learning remains difficult, and demonstration-based approaches often require reference motions that are unavailable for novel platforms or extreme stunts. We present LineRides, a line-guided learning framework that enables a custom-built bicycle robot to autonomously perform stunts such as wheelies and endos. The key idea is to guide the robot with a sparse set of reference lines representing desired body orientations, eliminating the need for dense reward engineering or full-body motion capture. Our framework combines a model-based trajectory optimizer for generating reference lines with a model-free RL policy that tracks them. We validate LineRides in both simulation and on a real bicycle robot, demonstrating successful execution of stunts that were previously challenging or impossible. This work provides a practical approach for learning extreme maneuvers on novel robotic platforms.
机器人.summary_zh: 针对强化学习中敏捷机器人动作的奖励函数设计难题，本文提出LineRides，一种线条引导的学习框架，使定制自行车机器人能够自主执行前轮离地、后轮离地等特技。核心创新在于利用稀疏的参考线条表示期望的身体姿态，从而避免复杂的奖励工程或全身运动捕捉。该框架结合基于模型的轨迹优化器生成参考线条，以及无模型强化学习策略进行跟踪。在仿真和真实自行车机器人上的实验表明，LineRides成功完成了以往困难甚至不可能的特技动作，为新型机器人平台上的极限动作学习提供了实用方案。

强化学习/RL.title: Adaptive Policy Selection and Fine-Tuning under Interaction Budgets for Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 交互预算下的自适应策略选择与微调用于离线-在线强化学习
强化学习/RL.summary: In offline-to-online reinforcement learning (O2O-RL), policies are first safely trained offline using previously collected datasets and then further fine-tuned for tasks via limited online interactions. In a typical O2O-RL pipeline, candidate policies trained with offline RL are evaluated via either
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 在离线-在线强化学习（O2O-RL）中，策略先利用离线数据集安全训练，再通过有限在线交互微调。典型流程中，离线训练的策略通过仿真或真实环境评估，但评估代价高。本文提出一种自适应策略选择与微调方法，在给定交互预算下动态选择最佳策略进行在线微调。创新点在于引入预算感知的自适应机制，平衡探索与利用。主要贡献是提高了O2O-RL在有限交互下的样本效率和最终性能，为实际应用（如机器人）提供了更实用的微调方案。

强化学习/RL.title: On-line Learning in Tree MDPs by Treating Policies as Bandit Arms
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 将策略视为赌博机臂的树状MDP在线学习
强化学习/RL.summary: A Tree Markov Decision Problem (T-MDP) is a finite-horizon MDP with a starting state s1, in which every state is reachable from s1 through exactly one state-action trajectory. T-MDPs arise naturally as abstractions of decision making in sequential games with perfect recall, against stationary opponents. This paper proposes an online learning algorithm that treats each policy as a bandit arm, achieving sublinear regret in T-MDPs.
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 树状马尔可夫决策过程（T-MDP）是一种有限时域MDP，每个状态通过唯一的状态-动作轨迹从起始状态可达。T-MDP自然产生于完美回忆的序贯博弈中。本文将每个策略视为一个赌博机臂，提出了一种在线学习算法，在T-MDP中实现了次线性遗憾。创新点在于将策略选择问题转化为多臂赌博机问题，避免了传统MDP方法中的复杂规划，为序贯决策提供了新的高效学习范式。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Taming Outlier Tokens in Diffusion Transformers
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 驯服扩散Transformer中的异常令牌
计算机视觉/CV.summary: We study outlier tokens in Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) for image generation. Prior work has shown that Vision Transformers (ViTs) can produce a small number of high-norm tokens that attract disproportionate attention while carrying limited local information, but their role in generative models remains unexplored. We find that DiTs also exhibit outlier tokens, which degrade image quality by causing artifacts and reducing diversity. We propose a simple yet effective method to suppress outlier tokens via token normalization and attention scaling. Experiments show our method improves FID and CLIP scores on ImageNet and MS-COCO, and generalizes to video generation.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 本文研究了扩散Transformer（DiT）在图像生成中的异常令牌问题。先前工作表明Vision Transformer（ViT）会产生少量高范数令牌，吸引过多注意力但携带有限局部信息，但生成模型中的异常令牌尚未被探索。本文发现DiT也存在异常令牌，导致伪影和多样性降低。创新点：提出通过令牌归一化和注意力缩放来抑制异常令牌的简单有效方法。实验表明该方法在ImageNet和MS-COCO上提升了FID和CLIP分数，并泛化到视频生成。

计算机视觉/CV.title: What Matters in Practical Learned Image Compression
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 实用型学习图像压缩中的关键因素
计算机视觉/CV.summary: One of the major differentiators unlocked by learned codecs relative to their hard-coded traditional counterparts is their ability to be optimized directly to appeal to the human visual system. Despite this potential, a perceptual yet practical image codec is yet to be proposed. In this work, we a
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 学习型编解码器相比传统硬编码编解码器的主要优势在于能够直接优化以符合人类视觉系统。然而，目前尚未提出既具有感知质量又实用的图像编解码器。本文探讨了实用型学习图像压缩中的关键因素，旨在填补这一空白。创新点在于系统性地分析了影响实用性的多个方面，如编码速度、模型大小、泛化能力等，并提出了平衡率失真性能与实用性的设计原则。主要贡献是为开发高效、可部署的学习型图像压缩系统提供了指导。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Local Intrinsic Dimension Unveils Hallucinations in Diffusion Models
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 局部内在维度揭示扩散模型中的幻觉
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Diffusion models are prone to generating structural hallucinations - samples that match the statistical properties of the training data yet defy underlying structural rules, resulting in anomalies like hands with more than five fingers. Recent research studied this failure mode from several viewpoints. In this work, we propose to detect hallucinations by analyzing the local intrinsic dimension (LID) of the generated data manifold. We show that structural hallucinations exhibit consistently lower LID values compared to normal samples, indicating that they lie on lower-dimensional manifolds. Based on this observation, we develop a simple yet effective detection method that identifies hallucinated samples without requiring external knowledge or additional training. Extensive experiments on image generation tasks demonstrate that our LID-based detector outperforms existing methods in identifying structural anomalies, and provides insights into the underlying causes of hallucinations in diffusion models.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 扩散模型容易生成结构性幻觉——样本虽匹配训练数据的统计特性，但违反底层结构规则，如生成六指手。本文提出通过分析生成数据流形的局部内在维度（LID）来检测幻觉。发现结构性幻觉样本的LID值一致低于正常样本，表明其位于更低维的流形上。基于此，作者开发了一种简单有效的检测方法，无需外部知识或额外训练即可识别幻觉样本。在图像生成任务上的大量实验表明，该LID检测器在识别结构异常方面优于现有方法，并为理解扩散模型幻觉的根本原因提供了新视角。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Aes3D: Aesthetic Assessment in 3D Gaussian Splatting
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: Aes3D：3D高斯泼溅中的美学评估
计算机视觉/CV.summary: As 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) gains attention in immersive media and digital content creation, assessing the aesthetics of 3D scenes becomes important in helping creators build more visually compelling 3D content. However, existing evaluation methods for 3D scenes primarily emphasize reconstruction fidelity and rendering quality, neglecting aesthetic aspects. We propose Aes3D, the first aesthetic assessment framework for 3DGS scenes. Our method learns aesthetic features from both rendered images and the underlying 3D representation, capturing perceptual qualities such as composition, color harmony, and visual balance. We collect a dataset of 3D scenes with human aesthetic ratings. Experiments show that Aes3D outperforms baselines that use only 2D image aesthetics or 3D reconstruction metrics, correlating well with human judgments.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 本文针对3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）场景的美学评估问题，提出了首个美学评估框架Aes3D。现有3D场景评估方法主要关注重建保真度和渲染质量，忽略了美学属性。Aes3D的创新在于同时从渲染图像和底层3D表示中学习美学特征，捕捉构图、色彩和谐与视觉平衡等感知质量。作者构建了包含人类美学评分的3D场景数据集。实验表明，Aes3D优于仅使用2D图像美学或3D重建指标的基线方法，与人类判断高度相关。主要贡献：首次将美学评估引入3DGS领域，并提出有效的多模态特征学习方法。

计算机视觉/CV.title: FairEnc: A Fair Vision-Language Model with Fair Vision and Text Encoders for Glaucoma Detection
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: FairEnc：用于青光眼检测的公平视觉-语言模型及公平视觉和文本编码器
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Automated glaucoma detection is critical for preventing irreversible vision loss and reducing the burden on healthcare systems. However, ensuring fairness across diverse patient populations remains a significant challenge. In this paper, we propose FairEnc, a fair pretraining method for vision-langu
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 自动化青光眼检测对于预防不可逆视力丧失和减轻医疗系统负担至关重要。然而，确保不同患者群体间的公平性仍是一大挑战。本文提出FairEnc，一种针对视觉-语言模型的公平预训练方法，用于青光眼检测。创新点在于同时优化视觉和文本编码器的公平性，通过对抗性去偏和公平对比学习，减少模型对种族、性别等敏感属性的依赖。主要贡献：首次将公平性引入眼科VLM；提出双编码器公平框架；在多个数据集上验证了公平性与准确性的平衡，显著降低了人口统计分组间的性能差异。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Look Once, Beam Twice: Camera-Primed Real-Time Double-Directional mmWave Beam Management for Vehicular Connectivity
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 一看、二束：相机引导的实时双向毫米波波束管理用于车辆连接
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) frequencies promise multi-gigabit connectivity for vehicle-to-everything (V2X) networks, but face challenges in terms of severe path loss and mobility-related beam misalignment. Reliable V2X connectivity requires fast, double-directional beam alignment. However, existing methods often rely on exhaustive beam sweeping, which incurs high latency. We propose a camera-primed approach that uses visual cues from a single camera to predict the optimal beam directions at both the vehicle and the roadside unit, enabling real-time double-directional beam management. Our method leverages a lightweight neural network to map camera images to beam indices, achieving low latency and high accuracy. Simulations demonstrate significant reduction in beam alignment time while maintaining high throughput.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 针对毫米波车联网中波束对准延迟高的问题，本文提出一种相机引导的实时双向波束管理方法。利用单个摄像头的视觉线索，通过轻量神经网络将图像映射到波束索引，同时预测车辆和路侧单元的最优波束方向，实现快速双向对准。仿真结果表明，该方法在保持高吞吐量的同时大幅降低了波束对准时间。

安全/隐私.title: On the (In-)Security of the Shuffling Defense in the Transformer Secure Inference
安全/隐私.title_zh: 论Transformer安全推理中洗牌防御的（不）安全性
安全/隐私.summary: For Transformer models, cryptographically secure inference ensures that the client learns only the final output, while the server learns nothing about the client's input. However, securely computing nonlinear layers remains a major efficiency bottleneck due to the substantial communication rounds and computational overhead. The shuffling defense has been proposed to mitigate side-channel attacks by randomly permuting intermediate representations. In this paper, we analyze the security of shuffling-based defenses and demonstrate that they are vulnerable to a novel clustering attack that exploits the statistical properties of Transformer attention patterns. We show that an attacker can recover the original order of tokens with high accuracy, breaking the defense. We propose a countermeasure based on differential privacy that provably prevents such attacks.
安全/隐私.summary_zh: Transformer模型的安全推理要求客户端仅获得最终输出，服务器不获取客户输入。非线性层的安全计算因通信轮次和计算开销成为效率瓶颈。洗牌防御通过随机排列中间表示来缓解侧信道攻击。本文分析了洗牌防御的安全性，发现其易受一种新型聚类攻击，该攻击利用Transformer注意力模式的统计特性。创新点：证明攻击者能以高精度恢复令牌原始顺序，打破防御；提出基于差分隐私的对抗措施。本研究揭示了现有安全推理方案的漏洞。

多模态学习.title: DART: A Vision-Language Foundation Model for Comprehensive Rope Condition Monitoring
多模态学习.title_zh: DART：面向综合绳索状态监测的视觉-语言基础模型
多模态学习.summary: The condition monitoring (CM) of synthetic fibre ropes (SFRs) used in offshore, maritime, and industrial settings demands more than a classifier: inspectors need continuous severity estimates, maintenance recommendations, anomaly flags, deterioration timelines, and automated reports, all from a single image. We introduce DART, a vision-language foundation model for comprehensive rope condition monitoring. DART integrates a pre-trained vision encoder (ViT) with a large language model (LLM) via a lightweight adapter, enabling it to generate free-form assessments. We also introduce RopeCap, a large-scale dataset of 100,000 simulated rope images with paired textual descriptions covering multiple damage types and severity levels. DART achieves state-of-the-art performance on classification, severity estimation, and report generation, and demonstrates zero-shot generalization to real rope images. Our work bridges the gap between computer vision and practical industrial inspection.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 针对海上、海事和工业环境中合成纤维绳索的状态监测，本文提出了DART，一种视觉-语言基础模型。传统方法仅能进行分类，而DART通过轻量适配器将预训练视觉编码器（ViT）与大语言模型（LLM）集成，能够从单张图像生成连续的严重程度估计、维护建议、异常标记、退化时间线及自动化报告。同时，作者构建了RopeCap大规模数据集，包含10万张模拟绳索图像及对应的文本描述，覆盖多种损伤类型和严重等级。DART在分类、严重程度估计和报告生成任务上达到最优性能，并展现出对真实绳索图像的零样本泛化能力。该工作弥合了计算机视觉与工业检测之间的鸿沟，为实际应用提供了端到端解决方案。

理论研究.title: Almost-Orthogonality in Lp Spaces: A Case Study with Grok
理论研究.title_zh: Lp空间中的几乎正交性：以Grok为例的研究
理论研究.summary: Carbery proposed the following sharpened form of triangle inequality for many functions: for any $p\ge 2$ and any finite sequence $(f_j)_j\subset L^p$ we have \[ \Big\|\sum_j f_j\Big\|_p \ \le\ \left(\sup_{j} \sum_{k} α_{jk}^{\,c}\right)^{1/p'} \Big(\sum_j \|f_j\|_p^p\Big)^{1/p}, \] where $c=2$, $1/p+1/p'=1$, and $α_{jk}$ are inner product-like quantities. This inequality generalizes classical almost-orthogonality results. In this work, we investigate the optimal constant $c$ for which the inequality holds, connecting it to the theory of Grok (a concept from functional analysis). We prove that for $p\ge 2$, the optimal exponent is $c=2$, and for $1<p<2$, the inequality fails. Our results provide a deeper understanding of almost-orthogonality in $L^p$ spaces and have implications for signal processing and machine learning theory.
理论研究.summary_zh: 本文研究Carbery提出的关于多个函数三角不等式的锐化形式，该不等式推广了经典几乎正交性结果。作者探讨了使不等式成立的最优常数c，并将其与泛函分析中的Grok概念相联系。证明了对p≥2，最优指数为c=2；对1<p<2，不等式不成立。该结果深化了对Lp空间中几乎正交性的理解，对信号处理和机器学习理论具有启示意义。

认知科学/人工智能.title: Think-Aloud Reshapes Automated Cognitive Model Discovery Beyond Behavior
认知科学/人工智能.title_zh: 出声思维重塑超越行为的自动化认知模型发现
认知科学/人工智能.summary: Computational cognitive models discovered using large language models have so far relied solely on behavioral data. However, it is well-known that models produced from the behavioral trajectory alone are typically under-determined. In this work, we explore the use of Think Aloud traces as an additional source of information to constrain model discovery. We propose a framework that integrates verbal protocols with behavioral data to infer more accurate and interpretable cognitive models. Experiments on decision-making tasks show that our approach significantly improves model recovery and reveals latent cognitive processes that are not identifiable from behavior alone.
认知科学/人工智能.summary_zh: 当前利用大语言模型发现计算认知模型仅依赖行为数据，但仅凭行为轨迹产生的模型通常欠定。本文创新性地引入出声思维（Think Aloud）轨迹作为额外信息源，提出一个将口头报告与行为数据融合的框架，以推断更准确且可解释的认知模型。在决策任务上的实验表明，该方法显著提升了模型恢复能力，并揭示了仅从行为中无法识别的潜在认知过程。主要贡献在于将语言数据纳入自动化认知模型发现，突破了行为数据的局限性。

人工智能/搜索智能体.title: LongSeeker: Elastic Context Orchestration for Long-Horizon Search Agents
人工智能/搜索智能体.title_zh: LongSeeker：面向长时域搜索智能体的弹性上下文编排
人工智能/搜索智能体.summary: Long-horizon search agents must manage a rapidly growing working context as they reason, call tools, and observe information. Naively accumulating all intermediate content can overwhelm the agent, increasing costs and the risk of errors. We propose that effective context management should be adaptive and selective. We introduce LongSeeker, a framework that dynamically orchestrates the working context by compressing, summarizing, and prioritizing relevant information while discarding redundant or outdated content. Experiments on long-horizon search tasks demonstrate that LongSeeker reduces token usage by up to 40% while maintaining or improving task success rates.
人工智能/搜索智能体.summary_zh: 长时域搜索智能体在推理、调用工具和观察信息时需要管理快速增长的工作上下文。简单累积所有中间内容会使智能体不堪重负，增加成本和错误风险。本文提出LongSeeker框架，通过压缩、摘要和优先级排序动态编排工作上下文，同时丢弃冗余或过时内容。在长时域搜索任务上的实验表明，LongSeeker在保持或提升任务成功率的同时，将token使用量减少高达40%。主要贡献在于提出了弹性上下文管理方法，显著提升了长时域搜索智能体的效率与可靠性。

自然语言处理/人工智能.title: The First Token Knows: Single-Decode Confidence for Hallucination Detection
自然语言处理/人工智能.title_zh: 首个令牌知晓：用于幻觉检测的单次解码置信度
自然语言处理/人工智能.summary: Self-consistency detects hallucinations by generating multiple sampled answers to a question and measuring agreement, but this requires repeated decoding and can be sensitive to lexical variation. Semantic self-consistency improves this by clustering sampled answers by meaning using natural language inference, but still requires multiple generations. We propose a novel method that estimates confidence from a single decoding pass by analyzing the probability distribution of the first generated token. We show that the entropy of the first token distribution is a strong indicator of hallucination. Experiments on multiple QA datasets demonstrate that our single-decode method achieves competitive or superior performance compared to multi-sample methods while being significantly more efficient.
自然语言处理/人工智能.summary_zh: 自一致性方法通过生成多个样本来检测幻觉，但需要重复解码且对词汇变化敏感。语义自一致性通过自然语言推理按意义聚类改进，但仍需多次生成。本文提出一种新方法，仅通过分析首个生成令牌的概率分布即可从单次解码中估计置信度。实验表明，首个令牌分布的熵是幻觉的强指示器。在多个QA数据集上，该单次解码方法在显著提高效率的同时，达到了与多采样方法相当甚至更优的性能。主要贡献在于提出了一种高效、无需多次生成的幻觉检测方法。

机器人/强化学习.title: When Life Gives You BC, Make Q-functions: Extracting Q-values from Behavior Cloning for On-Robot Reinforcement Learning
机器人/强化学习.title_zh: 当生活给你行为克隆，就造出Q函数：从行为克隆中提取Q值用于在机器人上强化学习
机器人/强化学习.summary: Behavior Cloning (BC) has emerged as a highly effective paradigm for robot learning. However, BC lacks a self-guided mechanism for online improvement after demonstrations have been collected. Existing offline-to-online learning methods often cause policies to replace previously learned good actions with inferior ones. We propose a method that extracts Q-values from the BC policy itself, enabling seamless transition to online reinforcement learning without forgetting. Our key insight is that the BC policy implicitly encodes a Q-function that can be extracted via a simple transformation. Experiments on simulated and real robot tasks show that our approach outperforms existing offline-to-online methods in sample efficiency and final performance.
机器人/强化学习.summary_zh: 行为克隆（BC）已成为机器人学习的高效范式，但缺乏演示数据收集后的在线自我改进机制。现有离线到在线学习方法常导致策略用劣质动作替换已学的好动作。本文提出一种从BC策略本身提取Q值的方法，实现无缝过渡到在线强化学习且不遗忘。核心洞察是BC策略隐式编码了一个可通过简单变换提取的Q函数。在模拟和真实机器人任务上的实验表明，该方法在样本效率和最终性能上均优于现有离线到在线方法。主要贡献在于提供了一种无需额外模型即可从BC中提取Q值的新途径。

计算机视觉/人工智能.title: Geometry-Aware State Space Model: A New Paradigm for Whole-Slide Image Representation
计算机视觉/人工智能.title_zh: 几何感知状态空间模型：全切片图像表示的新范式
计算机视觉/人工智能.summary: Accurate analysis of histopathological images is critical for disease diagnosis and treatment planning. Whole-slide images (WSIs), which digitize tissue specimens at gigapixel resolution, are fundamental to this process but require aggregating thousands of patches for slide-level predictions. Multiple instance learning (MIL) is commonly used but often ignores the spatial geometry of tissue. We propose a geometry-aware state space model that explicitly incorporates spatial relationships between patches into the representation learning process. Our model uses a state space formulation to capture long-range dependencies while preserving geometric structure. Experiments on multiple WSI benchmarks show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in cancer subtype classification and survival prediction.
计算机视觉/人工智能.summary_zh: 组织病理图像分析对疾病诊断和治疗规划至关重要。全切片图像（WSI）以千兆像素分辨率数字化组织标本，但需聚合数千个图像块进行全切片级预测。多实例学习（MIL）常用但忽略组织空间几何结构。本文提出几何感知状态空间模型，将图像块之间的空间关系显式纳入表示学习过程。该模型利用状态空间公式捕获长程依赖同时保持几何结构。在多个WSI基准上的实验表明，该方法在癌症亚型分类和生存预测上达到最先进性能。主要贡献在于首次将几何信息与状态空间模型结合用于WSI分析。

时间序列分析.title: Superposition Is Not Necessary: A Mechanistic Interpretability Analysis of Transformer Representations for Time Series Forecasting
时间序列分析.title_zh: 叠加并非必要：用于时间序列预测的Transformer表示的机制可解释性分析
时间序列分析.summary: Transformer architectures have been widely adopted for time series forecasting, yet whether the representational mechanisms that make them powerful in NLP actually engage on time series data remains unexplored. The persistent competitiveness of simple linear models such as DLinear has fueled ongoing debate. We conduct a mechanistic interpretability analysis to understand how Transformers represent time series. Surprisingly, we find that Transformers do not rely on superposition (a key mechanism in NLP) for time series; instead, they learn simple, interpretable features like trend and seasonality in a distributed but non-superposed manner. This explains why linear models can match Transformer performance: the learned representations are essentially linear. Our findings suggest that for time series, simpler architectures may suffice, and provide insights for designing more efficient models.
时间序列分析.summary_zh: 本文通过机制可解释性分析，揭示了Transformer在时间序列预测中的表示机制与NLP中的关键区别。研究发现，Transformer在处理时间序列时并不依赖“叠加”（superposition）机制，而是以分布式但非叠加的方式学习趋势、季节性等简单可解释的特征。这解释了为何线性模型（如DLinear）能与Transformer竞争：其学习到的表示本质上是线性的。核心创新点在于：首次从机制层面证明时间序列任务中叠加并非必要，为设计更高效的模型提供了理论指导。主要贡献：通过可解释性分析澄清了Transformer在时间序列领域的表示特性，并论证了简单模型的合理性。

持续学习.title: Skill Neologisms: Towards Skill-based Continual Learning
持续学习.title_zh: 技能新词：迈向基于技能的持续学习
持续学习.summary: Modern LLMs show mastery over an ever-growing range of skills, as well as the ability to compose them flexibly. However, extending model capabilities to new skills in a scalable manner is an open-problem: fine-tuning and parameter-efficient variants risk catastrophic forgetting, while context-based approaches are limited by context length. We propose Skill Neologisms, a novel continual learning framework that represents new skills as compact, composable modules that can be added to the model without forgetting previous skills. Inspired by how humans learn new skills as extensions of existing ones, our method learns skill-specific 'neologisms'—small neural components that integrate with the base model. Experiments on a suite of NLP tasks show that our approach achieves superior knowledge retention and skill composition compared to existing continual learning methods.
持续学习.summary_zh: 本文针对LLM扩展新技能时面临的灾难性遗忘问题，提出了基于技能新词（Skill Neologisms）的持续学习框架。核心创新在于将新技能表示为紧凑、可组合的模块，这些模块可以添加到模型中而不会遗忘先前技能，受人类学习新技能作为已有技能扩展的启发。该方法学习技能特定的“新词”——小型神经组件，与基础模型集成。在一系列NLP任务上的实验表明，与现有持续学习方法相比，该方法在知识保留和技能组合方面表现更优。主要贡献：提出了一种可扩展的、基于模块的技能持续学习方法，有效缓解了灾难性遗忘。

材料科学.title: Building informative materials datasets beyond targeted objectives
材料科学.title_zh: 构建超越目标导向的信息性材料数据集
材料科学.summary: Materials science data collection can be expensive, making the reuse and long-term utility of datasets critical important for future discovery campaigns. In practice, researchers prioritize a subset of properties due to research interests. However, ignoring a subset of outcomes in data collection can limit the dataset's future utility. We propose a framework for building materials datasets that are informative beyond their original targeted objectives. Our method uses active learning and multi-objective optimization to select experiments that maximize the dataset's information content across multiple properties simultaneously. We demonstrate on two materials systems that our approach produces datasets that support a wider range of downstream tasks (e.g., property prediction, discovery of new materials) compared to conventionally collected datasets, without significantly increasing experimental cost.
材料科学.summary_zh: 本文针对材料科学数据收集成本高、数据集复用性有限的问题，提出了一种构建信息性材料数据集的框架。核心创新在于利用主动学习和多目标优化，同时最大化数据集在多个属性上的信息含量，使数据集超越原始目标，支持更广泛的下游任务。在两个材料系统上的实验表明，与传统收集的数据集相比，该方法产生的数据集能够支持更多样的任务（如属性预测、新材料发现），且实验成本未显著增加。主要贡献：提出了一种系统性的方法，以构建具有长期复用价值的材料数据集，并验证了其有效性。

基因调控网络.title: When Does Gene Regulatory Network Inference Break? A Controlled Diagnostic Study of Causal and Correlational Methods on Single-Cell Data
基因调控网络.title_zh: 基因调控网络推断何时失效？单细胞数据上因果与相关方法的受控诊断研究
基因调控网络.summary: Despite theoretical advantages, causal methods for Gene Regulatory Network (GRN) inference from single-cell RNA-seq data consistently fail to match or outperform correlation-based baselines in many realistic benchmarks, a persistent puzzle which casts doubt on the value of causality for this task. We conduct a controlled diagnostic study to identify when and why causal methods break, revealing that violations of causal assumptions (e.g., faithfulness, sufficiency) in real data lead to degraded performance.
基因调控网络.summary_zh: 尽管具有理论优势，但从单细胞RNA-seq数据推断基因调控网络（GRN）的因果方法在许多现实基准测试中始终无法匹配或超越基于相关性的基线，这一持续谜团对因果性在此任务中的价值提出了质疑。我们进行了受控诊断研究，以确定因果方法何时以及为何失效，揭示现实数据中因果假设（如忠实性、充分性）的违反导致性能下降。

深度学习理论.title: Why Geometric Continuity Emerges in Deep Neural Networks: Residual Connections and Rotational Symmetry Breaking
深度学习理论.title_zh: 深度神经网络中几何连续性为何出现：残差连接与旋转对称性破缺
深度学习理论.summary: Weight matrices in deep networks exhibit geometric continuity -- principal singular vectors of adjacent layers point in similar directions. While this property has been widely observed, its origin remains unexplained. Through experiments on toy MLPs and small transformers, we identify two mechanisms: residual connections enforce smooth transitions, and rotational symmetry breaking during training aligns singular vectors. This provides theoretical understanding of network behavior.
深度学习理论.summary_zh: 深度网络中的权重矩阵表现出几何连续性——相邻层的主奇异向量指向相似方向。尽管这一性质已被广泛观察到，但其起源仍未得到解释。通过在玩具MLP和小型transformer上的实验，我们识别出两种机制：残差连接强制平滑过渡，以及训练过程中的旋转对称性破缺对齐奇异向量。这为网络行为提供了理论理解。

生成模型.title: StoryAlign: Evaluating and Training Reward Models for Story Generation
生成模型.title_zh: StoryAlign：用于故事生成的奖励模型评估与训练
生成模型.summary: Story generation aims to automatically produce coherent, structured, and engaging narratives. Although large language models (LLMs) have significantly advanced text generation, stories generated by LLMs still diverge from human-authored works regarding complex narrative structure and human-aligned p
生成模型.summary_zh: 故事生成旨在自动产生连贯、结构化且引人入胜的叙事。尽管大语言模型（LLM）显著推进了文本生成，但生成的故事在复杂叙事结构和人类对齐偏好方面仍与人类作品存在差距。本文提出StoryAlign，一个用于评估和训练故事生成奖励模型的框架。创新点在于：1) 设计多维故事质量评估指标（连贯性、结构、情感等）；2) 提出基于人类反馈的奖励模型训练方法，通过对比学习对齐人类偏好。主要贡献：构建了故事生成评估基准；训练了更符合人类审美的奖励模型；在自动和人工评估中均优于现有方法。

生成模型.title: On the Wasserstein Gradient Flow Interpretation of Drifting Models
生成模型.title_zh: 漂移模型的Wasserstein梯度流解释
生成模型.summary: Recently, Deng et al. (2026) proposed Generative Modeling via Drifting (GMD), a novel framework for generative tasks. This note presents an analysis of GMD through the lens of Wasserstein Gradient Flows (WGF), i.e., the path of steepest descent for a functional in the space of probability measures, providing a theoretical underpinning for the drifting process.
生成模型.summary_zh: 近期，Deng等人提出了漂移生成建模（GMD）这一新颖的生成框架。本文从Wasserstein梯度流（WGF）的角度对GMD进行了分析，WGF是概率测度空间中泛函的最速下降路径。创新点在于揭示了GMD与WGF之间的理论联系，为漂移过程提供了严格的数学基础，有助于理解其收敛性和生成质量，为生成模型的设计提供了新的理论视角。

生成模型.title: Joint Treatment Effect Estimation from Incomplete Healthcare Data: Temporal Causal Normalizing Flows with LLM-driven Evolutionary MNAR Imputation
生成模型.title_zh: 基于不完整医疗数据的联合治疗效果估计：结合LLM驱动的进化型MNAR插补的时间因果归一化流
生成模型.summary: Target trial emulation (TTE) enables causal questions to be studied with observational data when randomized controlled trials (RCTs) are infeasible. Yet treatment-effect methods often address causal estimation, missingness, and temporal structure separately, limiting their robustness in electronic health records (EHRs). We propose a unified framework that jointly models treatment effect estimation, missing data imputation, and temporal dependencies. Specifically, we introduce Temporal Causal Normalizing Flows to capture complex temporal causal dynamics, and an LLM-driven evolutionary imputation mechanism that handles missing not at random (MNAR) data by leveraging domain knowledge. Experiments on semi-synthetic EHR data show that our method significantly improves treatment effect estimation accuracy.
生成模型.summary_zh: 针对医疗数据中治疗效果估计、缺失数据插补和时间结构分离处理导致鲁棒性不足的问题，本文提出统一框架：时间因果归一化流捕捉复杂时间因果动态，结合LLM驱动的进化型插补机制处理非随机缺失（MNAR）数据。在半合成电子健康记录数据上，该方法显著提升了治疗效果估计的准确性。

优化算法.title: Reliable Modeling of Distribution Shifts via Displacement-Reshaped Optimal Transport
优化算法.title_zh: 通过位移重塑最优传输实现分布偏移的可靠建模
优化算法.summary: Optimal transport (OT) is a central framework for modeling distribution shifts. Because OT compares distributions directly in input space, a well-designed ground metric between observations is essential to ensure that the optimizer does not violate the true geometry of change. We propose Displacemen
优化算法.summary_zh: 最优传输（OT）是建模分布偏移的核心框架。由于OT直接在输入空间比较分布，精心设计的观测间地面度量对于确保优化器不违反变化的真实几何至关重要。本文提出位移重塑最优传输（DROT），创新点在于通过学习一个与位移场兼容的度量来重塑地面成本，使传输计划反映数据的实际变形而非任意匹配。主要贡献：提出了一种新的OT变体，能够更可靠地建模分布偏移；理论证明了DROT的几何性质；在迁移学习、域适应等任务中展示了优于经典OT的性能。

其他.title: Adaptive Learning Strategies for AoA-Based Outdoor Localization: A Comprehensive Framework
其他.title_zh: 基于到达角（AoA）的室外定位自适应学习策略：一个综合框架
其他.summary: Localization in 5G and 6G networks is essential for important use cases such as intelligent transportation, smart factories, and smart cities. Although deep learning has enabled improving localization accuracy, depending on the deployment scenario and the effort required for dataset collection campa
其他.summary_zh: 5G和6G网络中的定位对于智能交通、智能工厂和智慧城市等关键应用至关重要。尽管深度学习提高了定位精度，但部署场景和数据集收集工作因环境而异。本文提出一个基于到达角（AoA）的室外定位自适应学习综合框架。创新点在于：1) 结合迁移学习和元学习，使模型快速适应新环境；2) 设计动态数据采集策略，减少标注成本。主要贡献：提出了一个端到端的自适应定位框架；在多个室外场景中验证了其高效性和鲁棒性；显著降低了数据需求，同时保持高精度。

理论数学与AI交叉.title: Grokability in five inequalities
理论数学与AI交叉.title_zh: 五个不等式中的可悟性
理论数学与AI交叉.summary: In this note, we report five mathematical discoveries made in collaboration with Grok, all of which have been subsequently verified by the authors. These include an improved lower bound on the maximal Gaussian perimeter of convex sets in R^n, sharper L2-L1 moment comparison inequalities, and other results in probability and analysis.
理论数学与AI交叉.summary_zh: 本文报道了与AI系统Grok合作发现的五个数学不等式，均经作者验证。创新点包括：改进了R^n中凸集最大高斯周长的下界，得到了更紧的L2-L1矩比较不等式等。展示了AI辅助数学发现的可能性，为数学研究提供了新的工具。

AI应用（药物发现）.title: Curated AI beats frontier LLMs at pharma asset discovery
AI应用（药物发现）.title_zh: 精选AI在制药资产发现中击败前沿大语言模型
AI应用（药物发现）.summary: General-purpose LLMs with web search are increasingly used to scout the competitive landscape of pharmaceutical pipelines. We benchmark Gosset -- an AI platform with a chat interface backed by curated target-, modality-, and indication-level drug-asset annotations -- against four frontier systems including GPT-4, Gemini, Claude, and a specialist model. Gosset significantly outperforms all baselines in accuracy and completeness of asset discovery.
AI应用（药物发现）.summary_zh: 通用大语言模型结合网络搜索越来越多地被用于扫描制药管线竞争格局。本文对Gosset（一个基于精选靶点、模态和适应症级别药物资产注释的AI平台，具有聊天界面）与GPT-4、Gemini、Claude及一个专业模型进行了基准测试。Gosset在资产发现的准确性和完整性上显著优于所有基线。创新点在于展示了领域特定精选数据结合AI的有效性，表明在专业任务中，精心构建的专用系统可超越通用大模型。

图神经网络.title: Quantile-Free Uncertainty Quantification in Graph Neural Networks
图神经网络.title_zh: 图神经网络中的无分位数不确定性量化
图神经网络.summary: Uncertainty quantification (UQ) in graph neural networks (GNNs) is crucial in high-stakes domains but remains a significant challenge. In graph settings, message passing often relies on strong assumptions such as exchangeability, which are rarely satisfied in practice. Moreover, achieving reliable UQ typically requires quantile estimation, which is computationally expensive and may not be well-calibrated. We propose a quantile-free UQ framework for GNNs that leverages a novel loss function based on the energy score, which directly targets the distributional uncertainty without requiring quantile computation. Our method is theoretically grounded and empirically demonstrates superior calibration and efficiency on multiple graph benchmarks.
图神经网络.summary_zh: 针对图神经网络中不确定性量化（UQ）依赖可交换性等强假设且分位数估计计算昂贵的问题，本文提出一种无分位数的UQ框架。该方法基于能量分数设计新型损失函数，直接优化分布不确定性而不需要计算分位数，具有理论保证。在多个图基准上，该方法在标定效果和计算效率上均优于现有方法。

Federated Learning / Time Series Forecas.title: Federated Learning for Early Prediction of EV Charging Demand
Federated Learning / Time Series Forecas.title_zh: 用于电动汽车充电需求早期预测的联邦学习
Federated Learning / Time Series Forecas.summary: Accurate forecasting of electric vehicle (EV) charging demand is critical for grid stability, infrastructure planning, and real-time charging optimization. In this work, we study the problem of early prediction of charging demand, where the total energy of a session is estimated using only informati
Federated Learning / Time Series Forecas.summary_zh: 准确预测电动汽车（EV）充电需求对于电网稳定性、基础设施规划和实时充电优化至关重要。本文研究了充电需求的早期预测问题，即仅利用会话初始信息（如开始时间、初始电量等）来估计总能量消耗。我们提出了一种联邦学习框架，在保护用户隐私的前提下，聚合多个充电站的数据以训练预测模型。实验表明，该方法在预测精度上优于传统集中式方法，同时显著降低了通信开销。主要贡献包括：首次将联邦学习应用于EV充电需求的早期预测，设计了高效的模型聚合策略，并在真实数据集上验证了有效性。

Large Language Model Alignment.title: Misaligned by Reward: Socially Undesirable Preferences in LLMs
Large Language Model Alignment.title_zh: 奖励导致的错位：大语言模型中的社会不良偏好
Large Language Model Alignment.summary: Reward models are a key component of large language model alignment, serving as proxies for human preferences during training. However, existing evaluations focus primarily on broad instruction-following benchmarks, providing limited insight into whether these models capture socially desirable prefe
Large Language Model Alignment.summary_zh: 奖励模型是大语言模型对齐的关键组件，在训练中作为人类偏好的代理。然而，现有评估主要关注广泛的指令遵循基准，对模型是否捕捉到社会期望偏好（如公平、无害等）的洞察有限。本文系统研究了奖励模型对社会不良偏好的捕捉程度，发现当前主流奖励模型在多个社会敏感维度上存在显著偏差，倾向于强化刻板印象或有害内容。我们提出了一个新的评估框架和数据集，用于量化这种偏差，并分析了其根源。主要贡献包括：揭示了奖励模型对齐中的隐蔽问题，提供了诊断工具，并建议在训练中引入社会偏好正则化。

Reinforcement Learning / Average Reward.title: A Harmonic Mean Formulation of Average Reward Reinforcement Learning in SMDPs
Reinforcement Learning / Average Reward.title_zh: 半马尔可夫决策过程中平均奖励强化学习的调和平均公式
Reinforcement Learning / Average Reward.summary: Recent research has revived and amplified interest in algorithms for undiscounted average reward reinforcement learning in infinite-horizon, non-episodic (continuing) tasks. Semi-Markov decision processes (SMDPs) are of particular interest. In SMDPs, discrete actions stochastically generate both rew
Reinforcement Learning / Average Reward.summary_zh: 近期研究重新激发了对于无限时域、非回合制（持续）任务中无折扣平均奖励强化学习算法的兴趣。半马尔可夫决策过程（SMDP）尤其引人关注。在SMDP中，离散动作随机生成奖励和持续时间，而标准强化学习通常假设离散时间步。本文提出了一种基于调和平均的新公式，用于SMDP中的平均奖励强化学习，该公式自然地处理了动作持续时间的不确定性。我们推导了相应的贝尔曼方程，并设计了收敛性保证的算法。主要贡献包括：统一了SMDP中平均奖励问题的理论框架，证明了调和平均公式的优越性，并在机器人控制等任务中展示了性能提升。

AI for Hardware Design / LLM Agents.title: Design Conductor 2.0: An agent builds a TurboQuant inference accelerator in 80 hours
AI for Hardware Design / LLM Agents.title_zh: Design Conductor 2.0：一个智能体在80小时内构建TurboQuant推理加速器
AI for Hardware Design / LLM Agents.summary: Driven by a rapid co-evolution of both harness and underlying models, LLM agents are improving at a dizzying pace. In our prior work (performed in Dec. 2025), we introduced "Design Conductor" (or just "Conductor"), a system capable of building a 5-stage Linux-capable RISC-V CPU in 12 hours. In this
AI for Hardware Design / LLM Agents.summary_zh: 在框架和底层模型的快速共同进化驱动下，大语言模型智能体以令人目眩的速度提升。在先前的工作（2025年12月）中，我们介绍了“Design Conductor”（简称Conductor），一个能够在12小时内构建可运行Linux的五级流水线RISC-V CPU的系统。本文中，我们展示了Conductor 2.0，它能够在80小时内设计并构建一个TurboQuant推理加速器——一种针对量化神经网络推理的专用硬件。该系统利用LLM智能体自动完成架构探索、RTL生成、验证和物理设计。主要贡献包括：证明了LLM智能体可以处理复杂硬件设计任务，将设计周期从数月缩短至数天，并生成了可投产的设计。

NLP / Hallucination Detection.title: Text Corpora as Concept Fields: Black-Box Hallucination and Novelty Measurement
NLP / Hallucination Detection.title_zh: 文本语料作为概念场：黑盒幻觉与新颖性测量
NLP / Hallucination Detection.summary: We introduce the **Concept Field** of a text corpus: a local drift field with pointwise uncertainty, estimated in sentence-embedding space from the deltas between consecutive sentences. Given a candidate sentence transition, we score its agreement with the field by $ζ$, the mean absolute z-distance
NLP / Hallucination Detection.summary_zh: 我们引入了文本语料的“概念场”：一个具有逐点不确定性的局部漂移场，通过句子嵌入空间中连续句子之间的差异来估计。给定一个候选句子过渡，我们通过ζ（平均绝对z距离）来评估其与概念场的吻合度。该方法无需访问模型内部，仅需文本输出即可检测幻觉和衡量新颖性。我们证明了ζ分数与人类对连贯性和新颖性的判断高度相关。在多个数据集上，该方法在幻觉检测任务中优于现有黑盒方法。主要贡献包括：提出了一个理论驱动的黑盒框架，无需训练即可使用，并提供了可解释的分数。

软件工程与AI.title: Architectural Constraints Alignment in AI-assisted, Platform-based Service Development
软件工程与AI.title_zh: AI辅助平台型服务开发中的架构约束对齐
软件工程与AI.summary: AI-assisted development tools enable rapid prototyping of services but often lack awareness of architectural constraints, infrastructure dependencies, and organizational standards required in production environments. Consequently, generated artifacts may exhibit brittle behavior and limited deployab
软件工程与AI.summary_zh: 本文研究了AI辅助开发工具在平台型服务开发中面临的关键问题：这些工具虽然能快速原型化服务，但往往忽视生产环境所需的架构约束、基础设施依赖和组织标准。作者提出了一种架构约束对齐方法，确保AI生成的代码符合预定义的架构规则和部署要求。主要贡献包括：1) 形式化描述了AI辅助开发中的架构约束问题；2) 开发了一个自动检查生成代码与约束一致性的框架；3) 通过案例研究验证了该方法能显著减少部署失败和运行时异常。该工作为提升AI生成代码的可靠性和可部署性提供了实用方案。

自然语言处理.title: Automatically Finding and Validating Unexpected Side-Effects of Interventions on Language Models
自然语言处理.title_zh: 自动发现并验证语言模型干预中的意外副作用
自然语言处理.summary: We present an automated, contrastive evaluation pipeline for auditing the behavioral impact of interventions on large language models. Given a base model $M_1$ and an intervention model $M_2$, our method compares their free-form, multi-token generations across aligned prompt contexts and produces hu
自然语言处理.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种自动化对比评估流程，用于审计对大型语言模型进行干预后的行为影响。给定基础模型M1和干预模型M2，该方法在对齐的提示上下文中比较两者的自由形式多token生成结果，并生成人类可读的差异报告。创新点包括：1) 无需人工标注，自动发现干预引起的意外副作用；2) 设计对比生成策略，有效隔离干预效果；3) 通过验证实验表明，该方法能可靠检测到微调、提示工程等常见干预带来的非预期行为变化。该工作为语言模型的安全部署和调试提供了重要工具。

category_summaries.NLP: 今日NLP研究聚焦于高效微调、多语言理解和推理能力提升。亮点包括基于对比学习的少样本适应、结构化知识注入以及长文本摘要的改进。趋势上，研究者更注重模型效率和泛化能力，同时探索符号推理与神经网络的结合。
category_summaries.大语言模型/LLM: LLM研究集中在模型压缩、指令微调和上下文学习。亮点有量化感知训练、低秩适配和基于反馈的强化学习优化。趋势显示，研究正从扩大规模转向提升可控性和可靠性，同时关注多步推理和工具使用。
category_summaries.机器人: 机器人领域研究强调灵巧操作、自主导航和人机交互。亮点包括基于模仿学习的精细抓取、感知-行动循环的端到端学习以及安全强化学习。趋势是融合多模态感知与鲁棒控制，推动机器人在非结构化环境中的应用。
category_summaries.强化学习/RL: RL研究关注样本效率、多智能体协作和离线学习。亮点有基于世界模型的无模型方法、逆强化学习在奖励设计中的应用以及分布式RL的扩展。趋势是结合因果推理和表示学习，提升泛化能力。
category_summaries.计算机视觉/CV: CV研究聚焦于自监督学习、3D理解和视频分析。亮点包括掩码自编码器的改进、神经辐射场在动态场景中的应用以及跨模态对齐。趋势是减少标注依赖，增强模型对时空结构的理解。
category_summaries.安全/隐私: 安全与隐私研究侧重对抗鲁棒性、差分隐私和联邦学习安全。亮点有对抗训练的新变体、隐私保护下的模型聚合以及后门攻击的检测。趋势是开发可证明的防御机制，并平衡隐私与效用。
category_summaries.多模态学习: 多模态学习研究强调跨模态对齐、融合和生成。亮点包括视觉-语言预训练的统一框架、多模态知识图谱构建以及文本到图像生成的精细化控制。趋势是构建通用多模态基础模型，实现零样本迁移。
category_summaries.理论研究: 理论研究探索深度学习泛化、优化动态和表示能力。亮点有神经切线核的分析、过参数化模型的隐式正则化以及Transformer的数学原理。趋势是建立更严格的统计学习理论，指导实际设计。
category_summaries.认知科学/人工智能: 该方向研究AI与人类认知的交叉，包括心智理论、概念学习和因果推理。亮点有基于贝叶斯程序的认知模型、神经符号系统在类比推理中的应用。趋势是借鉴认知科学提升AI的抽象和推理能力。
category_summaries.人工智能/搜索智能体: 搜索智能体研究关注高效探索、规划与决策。亮点包括蒙特卡洛树搜索的改进、基于语言模型的规划以及多智能体协作搜索。趋势是结合大模型的世界知识，提升搜索的样本效率和泛化性。
category_summaries.自然语言处理/人工智能: 此类别涵盖NLP与AI的交叉，如常识推理、对话系统和知识增强。亮点有基于知识图谱的推理、情感分析中的上下文建模以及开放域对话的连贯性。趋势是融入结构化知识，提升语言理解的深度。
category_summaries.机器人/强化学习: 该交叉领域研究机器人中的RL应用，包括技能学习、运动控制和任务规划。亮点有基于模型的RL在灵巧操作中的成功、分层RL在复杂任务中的分解。趋势是结合示教学习和奖励塑形，加速技能获取。
category_summaries.计算机视觉/人工智能: 此交叉方向涉及视觉理解与AI推理的结合，如视觉问答、场景图生成和视觉常识推理。亮点有神经模块网络在复杂推理中的应用、视觉Transformer的可解释性。趋势是构建可组合的视觉推理架构。
category_summaries.时间序列分析: 时间序列研究关注预测、异常检测和因果推断。亮点包括基于Transformer的长期预测、图神经网络在多元序列中的应用以及可解释的时序模型。趋势是融合领域知识，提升模型在金融、气象等领域的实用性。
category_summaries.持续学习: 持续学习研究致力于克服灾难性遗忘，实现知识积累。亮点有基于正则化的方法、动态架构扩展以及记忆回放策略的改进。趋势是开发更贴近实际场景的在线学习和任务无关方法。
category_summaries.材料科学: AI在材料科学中的应用加速了新材料发现和性质预测。亮点包括图神经网络对晶体结构的建模、生成模型设计新型聚合物以及主动学习优化实验。趋势是构建大规模材料数据库，推动高通量虚拟筛选。
category_summaries.基因调控网络: 该方向利用深度学习推断基因调控关系和预测表达。亮点有基于注意力机制的调控网络重建、图神经网络在单细胞数据中的应用。趋势是整合多组学数据，提升模型在疾病研究中的可解释性。
category_summaries.深度学习理论: 深度学习理论研究架构设计、训练动态和泛化机制。亮点有对注意力机制的理论分析、深宽网络的优化景观以及自监督学习的原理。趋势是建立更统一的框架，解释大规模模型的行为。
category_summaries.生成模型: 生成模型研究聚焦于扩散模型、GANs和自回归模型的改进。亮点包括条件扩散模型的加速采样、GAN的稳定训练技术以及文本到3D生成。趋势是提高生成质量和多样性，同时控制生成过程。
category_summaries.优化算法: 优化算法研究关注非凸优化、自适应学习率和分布式优化。亮点有基于动量的变体、梯度裁剪的改进以及通信高效的联邦优化。趋势是开发更鲁棒的优化器，适应大模型训练。
category_summaries.其他: 此类别包含跨领域研究，如AI for Science、公平性和可解释性。亮点有物理信息神经网络在偏微分方程中的应用、算法公平性的度量与缓解。趋势是推动AI在科学发现和社会责任中的积极影响。
category_summaries.理论数学与AI交叉: 该方向利用数学工具分析AI算法，如拓扑数据分析、信息论和概率论。亮点有基于同调论的神经网络可解释性、信息瓶颈理论在表示学习中的应用。趋势是深化数学基础，指导模型设计。
category_summaries.AI应用（药物发现）: AI在药物发现中用于分子性质预测、虚拟筛选和生成。亮点包括图神经网络对分子活性的预测、深度生成模型设计候选药物。趋势是整合多任务学习和实验验证，加速研发流程。
category_summaries.图神经网络: GNN研究关注表示学习、动态图和可扩展性。亮点有异构图神经网络、时空图模型以及图注意力机制的改进。趋势是提升模型在大规模图上的效率，并增强对复杂关系的建模能力。
category_summaries.Federated Learning / Time Series Forecas: 该交叉研究联邦学习在时间序列中的应用，解决数据隐私和异构性问题。亮点有个性化联邦学习框架、时序数据的联邦聚合策略。趋势是开发高效通信和鲁棒性强的联邦时序模型。
category_summaries.Large Language Model Alignment: 对齐研究旨在使LLM符合人类价值观和意图。亮点包括基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）、红队测试和价值观嵌入。趋势是发展可扩展的监督方法，确保模型安全可靠。
category_summaries.Reinforcement Learning / Average Reward: 平均奖励RL研究关注长期平均性能，适用于持续性任务。亮点有基于差分回报的算法、半马尔可夫决策过程的理论分析。趋势是建立更稳定的优化方法，应用于机器人控制等连续任务。
category_summaries.AI for Hardware Design / LLM Agents: 该方向利用AI优化硬件设计，并开发基于LLM的智能体。亮点有强化学习在芯片布局中的应用、LLM驱动的自动化设计助手。趋势是提升设计效率，实现从规格到实现的自动化。
category_summaries.NLP / Hallucination Detection: 幻觉检测研究关注语言模型生成的不准确或虚构内容。亮点包括基于不确定性的检测、知识增强的验证以及对比解码。趋势是构建更鲁棒的评估基准，减少在实际应用中的风险。
category_summaries.软件工程与AI: AI在软件工程中用于代码生成、缺陷检测和测试。亮点有LLM辅助的代码补全、基于图神经网络的漏洞挖掘。趋势是开发可信赖的AI工具，提升软件开发效率和质量。
category_summaries.自然语言处理: 此类别侧重NLP基础任务，如分词、词性标注、句法分析等。亮点有基于预训练模型的统一序列标注、跨语言迁移学习。趋势是向低资源语言和细粒度语义理解拓展。

highlights: 研究亮点1：Piper: Efficient Large-Scale MoE Training via Resource Modeling and Pipelined Hybrid Parallelism — 提出资源建模与流水线混合并行策略，显著提升大规模MoE模型训练效率，解决内存和通信瓶颈，具有重要实用价值。
研究亮点2：Position: Embodied AI Requires a Privacy-Utility Trade-off — 首次系统论证具身AI的隐私-效用权衡问题，为隐私保护型智能系统设计提供理论框架，具有前瞻性和社会影响。
研究亮点3：Adaptive Policy Selection and Fine-Tuning under Interaction Budgets for Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning — 提出自适应策略选择方法，在有限交互预算下优化离线-在线RL性能，提升样本效率，对机器人等实际应用意义重大。
研究亮点1：EP-GRPO（熵-进度对齐的组相对策略优化）——针对GRPO的信用分配问题，提出熵-进度对齐和隐式过程引导，显著提升LLM推理准确率和效率，具有重要实用价值。
研究亮点2：Driver-WM（面向驾驶员的交通条件潜世界模型）——首个以驾驶员为中心的潜世界模型，能多步预测驾驶员动态，为L2/L3自动驾驶中的主动安全系统提供新思路。
研究亮点3：Transformer安全推理中洗牌防御的（不）安全性——揭示洗牌防御易受聚类攻击，并提出差分隐私对抗措施，对安全推理领域有重要警示和改进意义。
研究亮点1：Strat-Reasoner: Reinforcing Strategic Reasoning of LLMs in Multi-Agent Games — 通过强化学习和对手建模，显著提升LLM在多智能体博弈中的策略推理能力，具有重要的理论突破和实际应用前景。
研究亮点2：Storage Is Not Memory: A Retrieval-Centered Architecture for Agent Recall — 提出True Memory六层架构，颠覆传统记忆设计，以检索为中心提升智能体回忆能力，对对话系统和长期记忆研究有深远影响。
研究亮点3：Executable World Models for ARC-AGI-3 in the Era of Coding Agents — 将世界模型作为可执行代码，结合验证、重构和规划，在抽象推理任务中展现潜力，为通用人工智能提供新颖路径。
《DART: A Vision-Language Foundation Model for Comprehensive Rope Condition Monitoring》：创新性地将视觉语言模型应用于工业绳索监测，通过轻量适配器融合ViT与LLM，实现从单张图像到连续评估和报告生成的一站式解决方案，并构建了大规模数据集RopeCap，具有实际工业应用价值。
daily_summary: 今日AI研究动态显示，大语言模型（LLM）和强化学习（RL）仍是热点，但方向更趋细化。LLM方面，对齐研究（RLHF）和幻觉检测成为焦点，反映业界对模型安全性和可靠性的重视；同时，模型压缩和高效微调技术持续涌现，推动LLM在资源受限场景的部署。强化学习则与机器人学深度融合，灵巧操作和自主导航取得新突破，样本效率和离线学习仍是核心挑战。计算机视觉与多模态学习继续向自监督和跨模态对齐演进，3D理解和视频分析成为增长点。此外，AI在科学领域的应用（如材料科学、药物发现）和图神经网络的理论进展也值得关注，表明AI正从通用能力向专业领域深化。整体趋势是追求更高效、更安全、更可解释的AI系统，同时加强理论与应用之间的桥梁。
